tabs.infoDesc: Update contact info and puja goals

info.title: Spiritual Account Profile
info.subtitle: Update your contact information and spiritual puja intentions.
info.membershipDesc: You have unlocked complimentary Gangajal blessing and temple priority dispatch with every checkout!

orders.title: My Devotional Orders
orders.subtitle: Trace the shipment progress and history of your ordered sacred items.
orders.emptyDesc: Embark on your spiritual journey today and explore our catalog of certified energetic products.

actions.awaitingConfirmation: Awaiting confirmation from our admin team.
actions.shareMessage: Share your order invoice PDF with a thank you message 🙏

tracking.title: Ritual Progress Tracking
tracking.subtitle: Trace the energetic states of your spiritual order.
tracking.orderReceivedDesc: Your request has been registered in our sacred temple registry.
tracking.energizationDesc: Priests are conducting rituals and mantra chanting for your items.
tracking.dispatchedDesc: Your energized items have been dispatched via temple logistics.
tracking.deliveredDesc: Your sacred items have reached your domestic shrine.

orders.emptyFilterDesc: Your selected filters returned zero results. Explore our spiritual catalogs to find sacred essentials.

addresses.title: Saved Delivery Addresses
addresses.subtitle: Manage your primary shipping destinations for sacred deliveries.
addresses.noAddressesDesc: Add a default shipping address to enable rapid seamless checkouts.

wishlist.title: My Sacred Wishlist
wishlist.subtitle: Keep track of items you wish to invite into your home sanctuary.
wishlist.emptyDesc: Save sacred items and rudrakshas here to track their availability or purchase them later.

notifications.title: Communication Channels
notifications.subtitle: Control how you receive divine alerts, dispatch updates, and priest notes.
notifications.smsDesc: Get instant OTP codes, dispatch status, tracking links, and digital prasadam notifications directly on your mobile phone.
notifications.emailDesc: Receive priest reports, spiritual newsletters, ritual guidelines, and festival discount announcements in your inbox.
notifications.emailReceiptsDesc: Receive digital receipts and secure payment invoice PDFs instantly upon checkout.
notifications.dailyMantraDesc: Begin every morning with an encouraging spiritual quote or ritual recommendation based on current lunar phase (Tithi).

affiliate.title: Join Mantra Puja Affiliate Program
affiliate.subtitle: Become a devotee partner, share the divine blessings of certified Vedic pujas, and earn commission for every referred devotee.
affiliate.agreeLabel: I agree to the devotee program guidelines, commission tiers, and withdrawal conditions.

termsList.comissionDesc: You will receive a 10.00% commission on purchases made by users referred through your personal referral link. Share with one or multiple people and receive lifetime commissions whenever your referred devotees make a purchase.
termsList.holdingDesc: All earned commissions are initially placed in a pending state. Commissions are approved and released for withdrawal after a 7-day post-delivery cooling/holding period to protect against order returns and fraud.
termsList.withdrawalDesc: Withdrawal requests can be submitted once your approved available balance is ₹1,000 or greater. Payments are processed within 3-5 business days upon administrative verification.
termsList.integrityDesc: Purchasing items through your own referral link is strictly prohibited. Any suspicious, collusive, or fraudulent activity will result in immediate termination of affiliate status and the forfeiture of all unpaid earnings.

terms.commission: Earn up to 10% commission on referral purchases.
terms.payouts: Monthly payouts directly to bank account.
terms.guidelines: Ensure ethical sharing. Spreading false claims is prohibited.
terms.support: Access special banners and custom links.

affiliate.activatedDesc: Welcome to our sacred circle. You can now share custom links and track referrals below.
affiliate.dashboardDesc: Track your referral links and commission earnings.
affiliate.pendingApprovalDesc: Your application to the Mantra Puja Devotee Partner Program is currently under review by our temple administrators. Once approved, your unique sharing link, barcode scanner, and commission console will be unlocked here. Thank you for your patience!
affiliate.suspendedDesc: Your affiliate account has been suspended. Please contact support for assistance.

network.emptyDesc: You do not have any devotee referrals yet. Share your link to start earning rewards!

ledger.title: Commissions Ledger
ledger.emptyDesc: No commissions transactions have been recorded.

payouts.suspendedError: Payouts Blocked: Your affiliate account has been suspended. Please contact support for assistance.
payouts.thresholdError: Payout Threshold Lock: Your available balance must be ₹{{limit}} or higher to request payout.
payouts.bankNamePlaceholder: e.g. State Bank of India, HDFC

logout.title: Confirm Secure Logout
logout.desc: Are you sure you want to log out of your spiritual account session?
logout.confirmDesc: Are you sure you want to log out of your spiritual dashboard? Your saved addresses, puja orders, and synchronized wishlist will remain safely stored.
logout.returningHome: May peace and divine blessings be with you always. Returning home.
